_comment: vision-build (WF2) gate manifest for applied_groundwater_modelling. Package manager is uv (never bare pytest). Tests live in _SUPPORT/tests and run green in ~8s (282 tests). ruff/mypy/bandit/diff-cover are NOT installed, so lint/typecheck/SAST/mutation/changed-cov gates are omitted; coverage is report-only. {testIgnore} = flags to exclude the milestone's not-yet-satisfied locked acceptance tests during a per-step regression run.
